song.title: Jesus Is
song.author: Anna Schulz
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D A When there is sorrow, |Jesus is joy. . D When there is weakness, |Jesus is strength. .G Gm D F#m Bm When there’s depression, |Jesus is hope. .G A D When there is darkness, |He’s my light.
[V2] When there’s corruption, |Jesus is pure. When there’s confusion, |Jesus is sure. When there is poverty, |Jesus is wealth. When there is sickness, |He is well.
[V3] When there’s exhaustion, |He’s vigorous. When there’s no courage, |He valient is. When there is apathy, |Jesus cares. All things worth having |Jesus is.
